disclaimer: Paper design. Not investment advice. No performance claims.

purpose.description: Define the data contract, PIT constraints, input/output isolation, evaluation modes, and forbidden behaviors for any future backtest / simulation work in Stock Prediction System.
purpose.axis: Axis B — Strategy Simulation and Optimization
activationConditions: Feature availability registry v1 sources verified (P29A)
CTO approval token provided for each promoted mode

required.pitRule: All feature queries must use data with release/trade date <= asOfDate

required.note: Taiwan stock symbol from universe lock
From RuleBasedStockAnalyzer; must not be influenced by outcome data
From SignalFusionEngine; must not be influenced by outcome data

optional.note: From P29A PIT registry; lists source status per feature at asOfDate
usedSources / missingSources from active scoring snapshot
From P26A/P28C renderer; observability only, not scoring input

forbidden.reason: Future outcome label — violates PIT safety
News published after asOfDate — PIT violation
Post-hoc data often embeds future information

outcomeContract.description: Outcome fields are joined AFTER the input scoring snapshot is frozen. They are evaluation-only and must never flow back into scoring input.

fields.note: Date at which outcome was resolved
Percent return from entry to outcome

outcomeContract.joinTiming: Outcome fields must only be joined AFTER: (1) scoring snapshot is frozen, (2) asOfDate feature snapshot is sealed, (3) PIT registry gate is passed
forbidden: Outcome fields must NEVER appear in ActiveScoringSnapshot
Outcome fields must NEVER appear in factorSnapshot
Outcome fields must NEVER appear in scoreSnapshot
Outcome fields must NEVER be used as input to alphaScore calculation
Outcome fields must NEVER enter renderer input

pitSafetyRules: All features queried with date/releaseDate/publishedAt <= asOfDate strictly
No inference of outcome from feature data (no using future prices as proxies)
Outcome join must be temporally separate from feature snapshot construction
FinancialReport: filingDate <= asOfDate (not yet implemented; must not be used until AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE)
NewsEvent: publishedAt <= asOfDate (not yet verified; must not be used until AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE)
MarketRegime: detectRegime(asOf) uses TAIEX quotes up to asOfDate only

evaluationModes.description: Read existing corpus / scoring artifacts for analysis without modifying them
evaluationModes.note: Current mode for all P28/P29 work

evaluationModes.description: Run simulation pipeline with frozen corpus; no production corpus write; no optimizer
Expand simulation corpus with new asOfDate / symbol entries
evaluationModes.blockedReason: Blocked until P26F4 MonthlyRevenue import + post-import coverage preview PASS
Blocked until corpus expansion, outcome coverage, train/test split, and anti-overfit gates all pass

evaluationModes.description: Automated trade execution based on simulation results
evaluationModes.blockedReason: PERMANENTLY BLOCKED — this system is research-only

requiredGates: Feature availability gate: all input features must have pitStatus != HIGH_RISK_SOURCE_ABSENT
Outcome isolation gate: outcomePrice / returnPct / realizedReturnClass must not appear in scoring input
Corpus immutability gate: frozen corpus sha256 must not change
Leakage scan: all simulation output artifacts scanned for outcome-in-feature contamination
Forbidden claims scan: no ROI / win-rate / alpha / edge / profit / guaranteed claims
No DB write gate: dev.db sha256 unchanged throughout
forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT execute optimizer in P29C or without explicit optimizer approval token
Must NOT promote simulation results to production scoring
Must NOT generate investment recommendations, buy/sell signals, or trading instructions
Must NOT modify alphaScore or recommendationBucket based on simulation results
Must NOT use outcome fields as scoring inputs
Must NOT run backtest with HIGH_RISK_SOURCE_ABSENT source as active scoring feature
